markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review sprint progress and refine planning processes.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Planning Process:** A new process is launching to improve ticket intake, backlog management, and estimation. It includes a "Triage" status and mid-cycle check-ins to keep work flowing.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Q1 Renewals are Top Priority:** Megan and Jakub will focus on high-value Q1 renewals (Beck, Smith, Interwell, Seat), using new Linear tags for clear prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**PSEO Swap Approved:** The team approved swapping editorial work for PSEO for a client. This avoids nitpicking on editorial tasks and is framed as a low-risk experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**AEO Playbook is a Strategic Project:** The AEO Playbook is now a formal Linear project, with Talal leading the MVP definition and Nika supporting tactical SEO tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

## Topics

### Process & Planning Refinements

  - [**Problem:** The current planning process is designed for ticket submission, not intake, leading to an unclear backlog and poor estimation.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Solution:** Kyle is implementing a new process inspired by Stevie's client ops workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [**Triage Status:** All new tickets enter a "Triage" status for review and assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [**Future Cycle Assignment:** Tickets not for the current sprint are assigned to future cycles (e.g., Cycle 4) to keep the backlog clean.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Mid-Cycle Check-ins:** A new meeting will launch next week for tactical progress reviews, blocker identification, and new ticket intake.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**Ticket Quality:** Ticket quality is a recurring issue.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Required Info:** All dashboard requests must include "dash" in the title and a required heads-up period.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Estimation:** The team will add estimated hours to ticket sizes (small, medium, large) to improve planning accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Q1 Renewals & Account Prioritization

  - [**Problem:** The current ticket view lacks key account data (ACV, renewal date), making prioritization difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use Linear tags to enable at-a-glance prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Required Tags:** `ACV` and `Renewal Date` are the minimum needed.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle will work with Valentina to implement this system.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**Priority Accounts:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [**Megan:** Beck and Smith (both Q1 renewals).](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [**Jakub:** Interwell and Seat (both Q1 renewals).](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Deprioritized:** Webstacks (low ACV, recently renewed).](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

### Client Strategy & Ticket Review

  - [**Smith Account Ticket:** A complex ticket from Joe for client Maddie.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [**Context:** Joe is being proactive due to Maddie's particularity.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle and Megan will discuss urgency and scope in their 1-on-1.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [**PSEO Swap for Client:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Problem:** A client wants PSEO, but it's not in their SOW, and they are nitpicking editorial work.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Solution:** Swap editorial work for PSEO via a contract amendment.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Avoids nitpicking on editorial tasks and is framed as a low-risk experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Action:** Andi and Bridget will draft the amendment language.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**AEO Playbook:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [**Status:** Now a formal Linear project to define an MVP (e.g., base prompt sets).](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [**Tooling:** The playbook will be built in CheckThat to train users on the tool.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [**Support:** Nika will support Talal on tactical SEO tasks (e.g., indexing).](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**DataGrid SEO Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [**Status:** Nika completed an audit of post-migration SEO issues (meta descriptions, canonicals).](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [**Action:** Nika will send the audit directly to the DataGrid engagement manager.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)

### Team & Backlog Management

  - [**Mara's Departure:** Mara's last day was yesterday.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [**Impact:** Minimal disruption; accounts are reshuffled, and a new EM (Carly) starts next Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Critical Handoff:** Kyle is checking on the "abnormal" account to ensure the team is unblocked on QBR follow-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [**Backlog Cleanup:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [**Action:** All directors must review the backlog, assign tickets to the correct cycle, or cancel them if no longer needed.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [**Case Study Work:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle will move all case study tickets to Jason's ownership, with Jesus and Dani executing the work.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

      - [Work with Valentina to implement Linear tags for account prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Discuss the Smith ticket with Megan during their 1-on-1.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [Move all case study tickets to Jason's ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
      - [Check on the "abnormal" account handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)

      - [Focus on Q1 renewals for Beck and Smith.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [Discuss the Smith ticket with Kyle during their 1-on-1.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [Focus on Q1 renewals for Interwell and Seat.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [Outline PSEO next steps for the client, framing it as an experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [Create a Linear project for the AEO Playbook and define the MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [**Andi & Bridget:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [Draft the contract amendment language for the PSEO swap.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Nika:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [Send the completed DataGrid SEO audit to the engagement manager.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [**All Directors:**](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [Review the backlog and assign/cancel tickets as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [Finalize handoff documentation in Notion for all former accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/D74AKHGNsMzQDkqyMHMfRA3uP39PcbVz?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
